input.question: Show me a portfolio summary with allocation. Provide total portfolio value, daily change percentage (absolute and percentage), previous close value, year-to-date (YTD) return, and 1-year performance. Include sector allocation percentages and asset class allocation breakdown with weight percentages and current market values.

ui_planner_output.title: Portfolio Performance & Allocation
ui_planner_output.subtitle: Summary of portfolio value, daily and 1-year returns, plus sector and asset class breakdowns.

dataContract.description: Portfolio NAV, daily change, and YTD return
Portfolio total return over the last year
Portfolio breakdown by sector weighted by percentage
Asset class breakdown showing market value and weight percentage
